prompt: Tap left hole card before final in-position action.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Left hole card anchored before the final in-position action.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The left hole card is the right anchor because that private-card cue tells the in-position range what real hand support it is applying pressure with.
